raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr tu tohſ zaur ta-
vu leelu Sirđsschehlastibu ne ef-
i Tuḱsnefi atſtahjis/ tas Pa-
ebbeß-Stabs ne atſtahjahs no
ceim Deena/ tohs pa Zettu wes-
ams/ nedß tas Ugguns-Stabs
Nakti/ teem us to Zettu spihde-
ums/ pa kurreu tee gahje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tn eſſi tawn labbu
Barru dewis tohs pamahzi-
ams/ un to Mannu tu ne eſſi
atrahwis no winnu Mutteß/ un
ſſi teem uhdent dewis/ kad tee
biſa iſſlahpuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta eſſi tu tohſ Tuḱsneſi
ſchetrdesmits Gaddus uhſtur-
rejs/ teem ne irr nekahds Truh-
kums biſis/ winnu Drehbes ne
irr wezzas tappuſchas/ nedß win-
nu Rahjas uhſtuhkuſchas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu eſſi teem Kehninu
Walstibas un Laudis dewis/ un
eſſi teem to Walstu Stuheus
ſdallijs. Ta irr tee eemantoj-
scht to Senmi Siona/ prohti to
Senmi ta Kehnixa no Esboxa/
un to Senmi Oga/ ta Kehnixa
no Bahsana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir winnu Behrnis eſſi
tu wairojs ka tahs Debbes
Swaisgnes/ un eſſi tohs ecwed-
dis eckſch to Senmi/ no ka tu
winnu Tehweem eſſi fazzijs/ ka
teem bij ee-eet to eemantoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta irr tee Behrni tur
egaḣjuſchi/un to Semunteeman-
toſchi/ un tu eſſi tohs Semmes
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee irr uhſnehmuſchi
ſtiprus Vilſſahtus/ un tweenu
treknu Semmi/ un eemantojſcht
Namnuſ/ ar wiſſa Labbuna
pilnuſ/ iſzirstas Akkas/Wihna-
Dahrsus/ un Etjes-Dahrsus/ un
Kohkus/ no ka dauds ehſt warr/
un tee irr ehduſchi un pee-ehdu-
ſchi/ un tauki tapputſchi/ un tri
preezajschees zaur tawu leeſu
Labdarriſchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee irr pahrqalwig
tappuſchi/ un irr tew prettitur-
rejschees/ un tawu Baustibu at-
pakat atmettuſchi. Un tawu
Praweeschus nokawuſchi / kaſ
pretti teem leezinaja/ ka teem bi-
ja pee tewi atgreestees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta irr tee leelas Saiino-
fchanas padarrifschi/ tapehz eſſi
tu tohs dewis winno Waiduee-
fu Rohkā / kas tohs ſpatdiſtchi
Bet teem sawu Waidu Laika
uhs tewin bretzoht/ eſſi tu ne
Debbes dsirdejis/ un pehz ta-
wahm leelahm Apscheblofcha-
nahm eſſi tu teem Pestitajus de-
wis/ kas tohs no farwo Waid-
neeku Rohkas iſpestija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad teem attat Duf-
fefchana tappe / atgreesahs te-
atpakat taundarridami preeft-
tawa Waiga/ ta atſtahji tu-
tohs sawo Eenaideeku Rohkā/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
